content: I was returning home from the university library around 10:15 PM. I entered the parking lot of my apartment complex and was walking toward my building when a man in a black hoodie stepped out from behind a parked car. He said, 'Ma'am, I'm the night security guard. Is everything okay?' I said yes, but he grabbed me and pulled me behind the storage shed. He had a low voice, smelled of sweat and gym equipment. He forced me to have sex. I fought back — I scratched him and bit his left hand. He told me if I screamed, he’d kill me and my family. I escaped when he turned to tie his shoe. I ran to the main gate and called my roommate Priya immediately. I told the police he wore a black hoodie. I didn’t mention the blue jacket because I thought it was irrelevant. I didn’t know the man. I’ve never met him before. I did receive a call from an unknown number at 9:45 PM that night, but I ignored it. I didn’t recognize the number.
